search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Restricted to lastzwiki.com as requested. Prioritized concrete guide pages over home pages and ignored non-matching domains.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Core heroes hub with hero list and equipment section; good lead for character discovery and loadout cross-checks.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero names, tiers, and equipment context.

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table hub with category navigation and per-level badge costs; strong lead for research discovery and cost cross-checks.
results.primary_user_job: Look up research categories and badge costs.

results.title: Last Z Wiki - Complete English Guide | Strategies, Tier List & Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: English home page linking to heroes, research, alliances, buildings, and strategy pages; useful as a directory lead only.
results.primary_user_job: Navigate to the main guide sections.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Kept to the approved domain only. Found one direct event page and two supporting hub/entity pages that help cross-validate hero and event terminology. No off-domain results included.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Daily event cycle page linking research tasks to the Age of Science theme, and hero upgrade tasks to Hero Initiative.
results.primary_user_job: Find which daily event theme rewards research or hero upgrades.
claims_to_verify: Exact point values and reward tiers
Theme rotation schedule by day and time
Whether this applies to all servers or only certain HQ ranges

results.title: Heroes | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Core hero roster and power overview page for hero discovery and cross-linking to hero systems.
results.primary_user_job: Identify hero types and understand what drives hero strength.
claims_to_verify: Any current hero classes or naming changes
How hero power formulas are calculated

results.title: Event Center | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Hub page for regular and special events, useful for locating daily event pages and checking event categories.
results.primary_user_job: Find where event details are organized in the wiki.
claims_to_verify: Which events are currently classed as regular or special

search_records.search_notes: Search restricted to www.packsify.com returned no matching results for the exact query. No discovery leads found within the allowed domain.
search_records.no_results_reason: No results found on allowed domain for the provided query.

search_records.search_notes: Search restricted to mmediamreza.com and prioritized Last Z-specific pages. Results emphasize guide/reference pages over the homepage.

results.title: Shooter Camp Guide - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Dedicated guide for Shooter Camp upgrades, training cap, speed, and unlock requirements. Useful for troop-building mechanics.
results.primary_user_job: learn how Shooter Camp affects troop training and power growth
claims_to_verify: training cap and speed by level

results.title: Assaulter Camp Guide - Train Faster & Gain Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide focused on Assaulter Camp training, speed, cap, and power gains. Strong fit for early and mid-game unit progression.
results.primary_user_job: understand assaulter training upgrades and their growth impact

results.title: Last Z Laboratory Guide: Tech Research & Lab No. 2 Unlocking - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Research-focused page covering Laboratory function, technology progression, and second lab unlocking. Good cross-check source for tech systems.
results.primary_user_job: learn how research and extra lab queues work
